name: Iberia
message: [AI generated] Iberia, officially known as Iberia Líneas Aéreas de España and owned by International Airlines Group, is the flag carrier airline of Spain. The company was founded in 1927 and its headquarters are located in Madrid, Spain. It operates an international network of services from its main base of Madrid-Barajas Airport. Iberia is a member of the Oneworld airline alliance.
